raw:
**SCENE ANALYSIS -** A green cup is on a wooden table. A blue basket is to the right of the cup. A yellow cup is in front of the green cup. A blue bowl is behind the yellow cup. The green cup is a rigid container with a rim. STRATEGY - Reach the green cup at its rim for a stable grasp, lift it, and transport it to the blue basket. Failure modes include dropping the cup during transport or misaligning it with the basket. AFFORDANCE REASONING - Step 1 reach the green cup rim; Step 2 grasp the rim for secure hold; Step 3 transport above the basket; Step 4 place into the basket.

Goal: inside(green_cup, blue_basket)
Scene: green_cup, blue_basket, table, yellow_cup, blue_bowl
Step 1: reach(green_cup)
  affordance_region: the rim of the green cup
  contact: gripper_state(open) [progress]
  spatial: distance(gripper, green_cup, <, 0.03) [completion]
  direction: approach_axis(0, 0, -1) [progress]
  done_when: distance(gripper, green_cup) < 0.03
Step 2: grasp(green_cup)
  affordance_region: the rim of the green cup
  contact: holding(green_cup) [completion]
  direction: grasp_axis(0, 0, -1) [progress]
  done_when: holding(green_cup)
Step 3: transport(green_cup -> blue_basket)
  affordance_region: an empty area inside the blue basket
  spatial: above(green_cup, blue_basket, 0.05) [completion]
  safety: no_drop(green_cup)
  done_when: above(green_cup, blue_basket, 0.05)
Step 4: place(green_cup -> blue_basket)
  affordance_region: an empty area inside the blue basket
  contact: surface_contact(green_cup, blue_basket) [completion]; released(green_cup) [completion]
  pose: stable(green_cup) [completion]
  done_when: surface_contact(green_cup, blue_basket) AND released(green_cup)
<END_OF_PLAN>

steps.affordance_region: the rim of the green cup
the rim of the green cup
an empty area inside the blue basket
an empty area inside the blue basket
